hero.tagline: A home where cinema becomes memory, thought, and shared imagination.
hero.description: Founded in 1964 and operating under the Fédération Tunisienne des Cinéastes Amateurs (FTCA), our club in Hammam-Lif explores cinema not only as an art form, but as a way to question reality, reflect together, and give shape to ideas.
hero.quote: We use film to observe the world with tenderness, curiosity, and a deep desire to understand.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Join us for exclusive screenings and film discussions

cta.title: Join Our Community
cta.subtitle: Connect with fellow film enthusiasts and be part of memorable cinematic experiences that transcend the ordinary
